category.name: zoo.avatar
category.item: Create your own avatar here and show off to your friends! Have you already chosen your gender? Then decide on your facial features!
The eye is a window to the soul! Which ones suit you the best?
Smiling, laughing, grinning... Your mouth shows others how you're feeling!
Hair color and hairstyle can completely change your look!
Head gear (?) can make you look important!
Choose the suitable outfit for the zoo.
